member.name: T:JG.WebKit.Views.Abstractions.ITemplateProvider
member.summary: Provides template sources from various backends (file, database, memory, etc.).

member.name: M:JG.WebKit.Views.Abstractions.ITemplateProvider.GetTemplateAsync(System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Gets a template by path.
member.param: The template path or identifier.
Cancellation token.
member.returns: The template source, or null if not found.

member.name: P:JG.WebKit.Views.Abstractions.ITemplateProvider.SupportsHotReload
member.summary: Gets a value indicating whether this provider supports hot-reload notification.

member.name: T:JG.WebKit.Views.Abstractions.ITemplateHelper
member.summary: Represents a registered template helper function.

member.name: P:JG.WebKit.Views.Abstractions.ITemplateHelper.Name
member.summary: Gets the name of the helper as used in templates.

member.name: M:JG.WebKit.Views.Abstractions.ITemplateHelper.Execute(System.Object[],JG.WebKit.Views.TemplateContext)
member.summary: Executes the helper with the given arguments.
member.param: The arguments passed to the helper.
The template context.
member.returns: The string output of the helper.

member.name: T:JG.WebKit.Views.Abstractions.IViewEngine
member.summary: The main template rendering engine.

member.name: M:JG.WebKit.Views.Abstractions.IViewEngine.RenderAsync(System.String,JG.WebKit.Views.TemplateContext,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Renders a template by path with the given context.
member.param: The path to the template.
The template context with data and globals.
Cancellation token.

member.name: M:JG.WebKit.Views.Abstractions.IViewEngine.RenderStringAsync(System.String,JG.WebKit.Views.TemplateContext,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Renders a template string directly with the given context.
member.param: The template content as a string.
The template context with data and globals.
Cancellation token.

member.name: M:JG.WebKit.Views.Abstractions.IViewEngine.InvalidateCache(System.String)
member.summary: Invalidates the compiled template cache.
member.param: The template path to invalidate, or null to clear the entire cache.

member.name: T:JG.WebKit.Views.Compilation.Parser
member.summary: Parses a token stream into an abstract syntax tree (AST) of renderable nodes. Implements a recursive descent parser with position tracking to prevent infinite loops.

member.name: M:JG.WebKit.Views.Compilation.Parser.#ctor(System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyList{JG.WebKit.Views.Compilation.Token},System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary{System.String,JG.WebKit.Views.Abstractions.ITemplateHelper},JG.WebKit.Views.ViewEngineOptions)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the Parser class.
member.param: The token stream to parse.
Optional dictionary of registered helpers for helper node creation.
Optional engine options for parser configuration.

member.name: M:JG.WebKit.Views.Compilation.Parser.Parse
member.summary: Parses the token stream into a list of nodes representing the template's AST.
member.returns: A read-only list of parsed nodes ready for rendering.

member.name: M:JG.WebKit.Views.Compilation.Parser.ParseEach(System.String)
member.summary: Parses an each (loop) block with optional empty fallback. Syntax: {{#each collection as itemName }}...{{#empty}}...{{/empty}}{{/each}}

member.name: M:JG.WebKit.Views.Compilation.Parser.ParseNode
member.summary: Parses a single node from the current token position. CRITICAL: This method handles position advancement for single-token node types to prevent infinite loops. Block-type nodes (if, each, section, yield-default) handle their own position advancement internally.
member.returns: The parsed node, or null if the token type is not recognized.

member.name: T:JG.WebKit.Views.Compilation.TokenType
member.summary: Defines the types of tokens recognized by the template tokenizer. Each token type corresponds to a specific template syntax element.

member.name: F:JG.WebKit.Views.Compilation.TokenType.Literal
member.summary: Raw HTML/text between template tags.

member.name: F:JG.WebKit.Views.Compilation.TokenType.Variable
member.summary: Variable expression with HTML escaping: {{ expr }}

member.name: F:JG.WebKit.Views.Compilation.TokenType.RawVariable
member.summary: Raw (unescaped) variable expression: {{{ expr }}}

member.name: F:JG.WebKit.Views.Compilation.TokenType.Comment
member.summary: Comment that won't appear in output: {{-- text --}}

member.name: F:JG.WebKit.Views.Compilation.TokenType.PartialStart
member.summary: Partial include: {{> name }}, {{> name "variant" }}, or {{> name context }}

member.name: F:JG.WebKit.Views.Compilation.TokenType.IfStart
member.summary: If block start: {{#if expr }}

member.name: F:JG.WebKit.Views.Compilation.TokenType.ElseIf
member.summary: Else-if branch: {{#elseif expr }}

member.name: F:JG.WebKit.Views.Compilation.TokenType.Else
member.summary: Else branch: {{#else}}

member.name: F:JG.WebKit.Views.Compilation.TokenType.IfEnd
member.summary: If block end: {{/if}}

member.name: F:JG.WebKit.Views.Compilation.TokenType.EachStart
member.summary: Loop block start: {{#each collection as item }}

member.name: F:JG.WebKit.Views.Compilation.TokenType.Empty
member.summary: Empty fallback in loop: {{#empty}}

member.name: F:JG.WebKit.Views.Compilation.TokenType.EachEnd
member.summary: Loop block end: {{/each}}

member.name: F:JG.WebKit.Views.Compilation.TokenType.LayoutDecl
member.summary: Layout declaration: {{#layout "name" }}

member.name: F:JG.WebKit.Views.Compilation.TokenType.SectionStart
member.summary: Section definition start: {{#section "name" }}

member.name: F:JG.WebKit.Views.Compilation.TokenType.SectionEnd
member.summary: Section definition end: {{/section}}

member.name: F:JG.WebKit.Views.Compilation.TokenType.YieldTag
member.summary: Yield point in layout: {{#yield "name" }}

member.name: F:JG.WebKit.Views.Compilation.TokenType.YieldDefaultStart
member.summary: Yield with default content start: {{#yield-default "name" }}

member.name: F:JG.WebKit.Views.Compilation.TokenType.YieldDefaultEnd
member.summary: Yield with default content end: {{/yield-default}}

member.name: F:JG.WebKit.Views.Compilation.TokenType.HelperCall
member.summary: Helper function call: {{ helperName arg1 arg2 }}

member.name: T:JG.WebKit.Views.Compilation.Token
member.summary: Represents a single token extracted from a template during tokenization. Contains the token type, content, and source location for error reporting.

member.name: P:JG.WebKit.Views.Compilation.Token.Type
member.summary: Gets or sets the type of this token.

member.name: P:JG.WebKit.Views.Compilation.Token.Content
member.summary: Gets or sets the token content (the text inside the template tags or the literal text).

member.name: P:JG.WebKit.Views.Compilation.Token.Line
member.summary: Gets or sets the source line number where this token was found (1-based).

member.name: P:JG.WebKit.Views.Compilation.Token.Column
member.summary: Gets or sets the source column number where this token starts (1-based).

member.name: T:JG.WebKit.Views.Compilation.Tokenizer
member.summary: Tokenizes template source code into a stream of tokens for parsing. Implements a forward-scanning lexer that recognizes all template syntax elements. Tracks line and column numbers for accurate error reporting.

member.name: M:JG.WebKit.Views.Compilation.Tokenizer.#ctor(System.String)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the Tokenizer class.
member.param: The template source code to tokenize.

member.name: M:JG.WebKit.Views.Compilation.Tokenizer.Tokenize
member.summary: Tokenizes the entire input and returns a read-only list of tokens. Scans the input linearly, alternating between literal text and template tags.
member.returns: A read-only list of tokens representing the template structure.

member.name: M:JG.WebKit.Views.Compilation.Tokenizer.TokenizeTag
member.summary: Tokenizes a template tag starting with {{ and determines its type. Handles all tag variants: - {{{ }}} for raw variables - {{-- --}} for comments - {{> }} for partials - {{# }} for block starts - {{/ }} for block ends - {{ }} for variables and helpers

member.name: M:JG.WebKit.Views.Compilation.Tokenizer.ParseBlockTag(System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Parses a block tag (starts with {{#) and determines its specific type. Examples: if, elseif, else, each, empty, layout, section, yield, yield-default.
member.param: The line number where the tag starts.
The column number where the tag starts.

member.name: M:JG.WebKit.Views.Compilation.Tokenizer.TokenizeLiteral
member.summary: Tokenizes literal text content between template tags. Accumulates characters until the next {{ is encountered or end of input.

member.name: T:JG.WebKit.Views.Helpers.DateHelper
member.summary: Built-in date formatting helper.

member.name: T:JG.WebKit.Views.Helpers.TruncateHelper
member.summary: Built-in string truncation helper.

member.name: T:JG.WebKit.Views.Helpers.UppercaseHelper
member.summary: Built-in uppercase helper.

member.name: T:JG.WebKit.Views.Helpers.LowercaseHelper
member.summary: Built-in lowercase helper.

member.name: T:JG.WebKit.Views.Helpers.JsonHelper
member.summary: Built-in JSON serialization helper.

member.name: T:JG.WebKit.Views.Helpers.AssetHelper
member.summary: Built-in asset path helper.

member.name: M:JG.WebKit.Views.Helpers.AssetHelper.#ctor(JG.WebKit.Views.ViewEngineOptions)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the AssetHelper class.
member.param: The view engine options.

member.name: T:JG.WebKit.Views.Helpers.ImageHelper
member.summary: Built-in image path helper.

member.name: M:JG.WebKit.Views.Helpers.ImageHelper.#ctor(JG.WebKit.Views.ViewEngineOptions)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the ImageHelper class.
member.param: The view engine options.

member.name: T:JG.WebKit.Views.Helpers.ScriptHelper
member.summary: Built-in script path helper.

member.name: M:JG.WebKit.Views.Helpers.ScriptHelper.#ctor(JG.WebKit.Views.ViewEngineOptions)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the ScriptHelper class.
member.param: The view engine options.

member.name: T:JG.WebKit.Views.Helpers.FontHelper
member.summary: Built-in font path helper.

member.name: M:JG.WebKit.Views.Helpers.FontHelper.#ctor(JG.WebKit.Views.ViewEngineOptions)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the FontHelper class.
member.param: The view engine options.

member.name: T:JG.WebKit.Views.Helpers.MediaHelper
member.summary: Built-in media path helper.

member.name: M:JG.WebKit.Views.Helpers.MediaHelper.#ctor(JG.WebKit.Views.ViewEngineOptions)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the MediaHelper class.
member.param: The view engine options.

member.name: T:JG.WebKit.Views.Helpers.DefaultHelper
T:JG.WebKit.Views.Helpers.IfValHelper
T:JG.WebKit.Views.Helpers.ConcatHelper
T:JG.WebKit.Views.Helpers.ReplaceHelper
T:JG.WebKit.Views.Helpers.CountHelper
T:JG.WebKit.Views.Internal.Expression
member.summary: Evaluates template expressions with dot notation, array indexing, and property access. Implements caching for PropertyInfo lookups to optimize POCO object reflection.

member.name: M:JG.WebKit.Views.Internal.Expression.#ctor(System.String)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the Expression class.
member.param: The expression string to evaluate (e.g., "user.profile.name").

member.name: M:JG.WebKit.Views.Internal.Expression.Parse(System.String)
member.summary: Factory method to create a new Expression instance.
member.param: The expression string to parse.
member.returns: A new Expression instance ready for evaluation.

member.name: M:JG.WebKit.Views.Internal.Expression.Evaluate(JG.WebKit.Views.TemplateContext)
member.summary: Evaluates the expression against the provided context. Supports dot notation (user.name), array indexing (items[0]), and deep nesting. Returns null for missing variables without throwing exceptions.
member.param: The template context containing data and globals.
member.returns: The evaluated value, or null if the expression cannot be resolved.

member.name: T:JG.WebKit.Views.Internal.ConditionEvaluator
member.summary: Evaluates conditional expressions for template if/elseif blocks. Supports comparison operators (==, !=, >, <, >=, <=), negation (!), and truthy checks. String comparisons are case-sensitive (ordinal). Numeric comparisons work across int, long, float, double types.

member.name: M:JG.WebKit.Views.Internal.ConditionEvaluator.#ctor(System.String)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the ConditionEvaluator class.
member.param: The condition expression to evaluate (e.g., "count >= 10").

member.name: M:JG.WebKit.Views.Internal.ConditionEvaluator.Evaluate(JG.WebKit.Views.TemplateContext)
member.summary: Evaluates the condition against the provided context.
member.param: The template context for variable resolution.
member.returns: True if the condition is satisfied, otherwise false.

member.name: T:JG.WebKit.Views.Internal.HtmlEscape
member.summary: Provides high-performance HTML entity escaping to prevent XSS attacks. Implements a zero-allocation fast path for strings that don't need escaping.

member.name: M:JG.WebKit.Views.Internal.HtmlEscape.Escape(System.String)
member.summary: Escapes HTML special characters to their entity equivalents. Fast path: Returns the input unchanged if no escaping is needed (zero allocations). Slow path: Creates a new string with escaped entities.
member.param: The string to escape.

member.name: T:JG.WebKit.Views.Internal.CompiledTemplate
member.summary: Represents a compiled template with its rendering delegate and metadata.

member.name: P:JG.WebKit.Views.Internal.CompiledTemplate.RenderFunc
member.summary: Gets the compiled rendering function that executes the template.

member.name: P:JG.WebKit.Views.Internal.CompiledTemplate.CompiledAt
member.summary: Gets the timestamp when this template was compiled.

member.name: P:JG.WebKit.Views.Internal.CompiledTemplate.Nodes
member.summary: Gets the parsed nodes that make up the template.

member.name: P:JG.WebKit.Views.Internal.CompiledTemplate.LayoutPath
member.summary: Gets the layout path if this template declares a layout, otherwise null.

member.name: P:JG.WebKit.Views.Internal.CompiledTemplate.EstimatedOutputSize
member.summary: Gets the estimated output size for StringBuilder pre-allocation.

member.name: T:JG.WebKit.Views.Internal.ViewEngine
member.summary: Core view engine implementation that compiles and renders templates. Thread-safe and optimized for high-throughput scenarios.

member.name: M:JG.WebKit.Views.Internal.ViewEngine.#ctor(JG.WebKit.Views.Abstractions.ITemplateProvider,JG.WebKit.Views.ViewEngineOptions,System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary{System.String,JG.WebKit.Views.Abstractions.ITemplateHelper})
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the ViewEngine class.
member.param: The template provider for loading template sources.
Configuration options for the engine.
Dictionary of custom template helpers.

member.name: M:JG.WebKit.Views.Internal.ViewEngine.RenderAsync(System.String,JG.WebKit.Views.TemplateContext,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Renders a template asynchronously from the specified path.
member.param: The path of the template to render.
The context object containing template data.
Optional. A cancellation token.

member.name: M:JG.WebKit.Views.Internal.ViewEngine.RenderStringAsync(System.String,JG.WebKit.Views.TemplateContext,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Renders an inline template string with the provided context. Useful for rendering dynamic templates without file system access.
member.param: The template content as a string.
The rendering context containing data and globals.
Cancellation token for async operations.

member.name: M:JG.WebKit.Views.Internal.ViewEngine.RenderPartialAsync(JG.WebKit.Views.Nodes.PartialNode,JG.WebKit.Views.TemplateContext,System.Int32)
member.summary: Renders a partial template with optional context. This method is the core of partial inclusion, handling: - Path resolution with multiple fallback attempts - Variant-based partial selection (e.g., card-mobile.html vs card.html) - Context transformation from POCO objects to dictionaries - Depth tracking to prevent infinite inclusion

member.name: M:JG.WebKit.Views.Internal.ViewEngine.InvalidateCache(System.String)
member.summary: Invalidates the cache for the specified template path, or clears the entire cache if no path is specified.
member.param: Optional. The path of the template to invalidate.

member.name: M:JG.WebKit.Views.Internal.ViewEngine.Dispose
member.summary: Disposes the view engine, releasing any resources.

member.name: T:JG.WebKit.Views.Nodes.INode
member.summary: Represents a renderable node in the template's abstract syntax tree (AST). All nodes implement async rendering with depth tracking for recursion prevention.

member.name: M:JG.WebKit.Views.Nodes.INode.RenderAsync(JG.WebKit.Views.TemplateContext,System.Int32)
member.summary: Renders this node asynchronously to produce HTML output.
member.param: The template context containing data and globals.
Current inclusion depth for preventing infinite recursion.

member.name: T:JG.WebKit.Views.Nodes.LiteralNode
member.summary: Represents a literal text node that outputs its content unchanged. Used for static HTML/text content between template tags.

member.name: M:JG.WebKit.Views.Nodes.LiteralNode.#ctor(System.String)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the LiteralNode class.
member.param: The literal text content to render.

member.name: M:JG.WebKit.Views.Nodes.LiteralNode.RenderAsync(JG.WebKit.Views.TemplateContext,System.Int32)
member.summary: Renders the literal content unchanged.

member.name: T:JG.WebKit.Views.Nodes.VariableNode
M:JG.WebKit.Views.Nodes.VariableNode.#ctor(System.String,System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary{System.String,JG.WebKit.Views.Abstractions.ITemplateHelper})
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the VariableNode class.
member.param: The expression to evaluate (e.g., "user.name" or "date publishedAt").
Optional dictionary of registered helpers for helper call detection.

member.name: M:JG.WebKit.Views.Nodes.VariableNode.RenderAsync(JG.WebKit.Views.TemplateContext,System.Int32)
member.summary: Renders the variable or helper call with HTML escaping. If the expression starts with a registered helper name, executes the helper. Otherwise evaluates the expression and HTML-escapes the result.

member.name: T:JG.WebKit.Views.Nodes.RawVariableNode
member.summary: Represents a raw output variable node that renders unescaped content. SECURITY WARNING: Only use with trusted content to prevent XSS attacks. Syntax: {{{ rawVariable }}} Can be globally disabled via ViewEngineOptions.AllowRawOutput.

member.name: M:JG.WebKit.Views.Nodes.RawVariableNode.#ctor(System.String,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the RawVariableNode class.
member.param: The expression to evaluate.
Whether raw output is allowed (from ViewEngineOptions).

member.name: M:JG.WebKit.Views.Nodes.RawVariableNode.RenderAsync(JG.WebKit.Views.TemplateContext,System.Int32)
member.summary: Renders the variable value. If AllowRawOutput is false, HTML-escapes the output for security.

member.name: T:JG.WebKit.Views.Nodes.IfNode

M:JG.WebKit.Views.Nodes.IfNode.#ctor(System.String,System.Collections.Generic.List{JG.WebKit.Views.Nodes.INode},System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary{System.String,System.Collections.Generic.List{JG.WebKit.Views.Nodes.INode}},System.Collections.Generic.List{JG.WebKit.Views.Nodes.INode})
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the IfNode class.
member.param: The primary condition expression.
Nodes to render if the primary condition is true.
Dictionary of elseif conditions and their nodes.
Nodes to render if all conditions are false (optional).

member.name: M:JG.WebKit.Views.Nodes.IfNode.RenderAsync(JG.WebKit.Views.TemplateContext,System.Int32)
member.summary: Evaluates the condition(s) and renders the appropriate branch. Evaluates conditions in order: if -> elseif(s) -> else.

member.name: T:JG.WebKit.Views.Nodes.EachNode
M:JG.WebKit.Views.Nodes.EachNode.#ctor(System.String,System.String,System.Collections.Generic.List{JG.WebKit.Views.Nodes.INode},System.Collections.Generic.List{JG.WebKit.Views.Nodes.INode})
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the EachNode class.
member.param: Expression that evaluates to an enumerable collection.
Variable name for the current item in the loop.
Nodes to render for each item in the collection.
Nodes to render if the collection is null or empty (optional).

member.name: M:JG.WebKit.Views.Nodes.EachNode.RenderAsync(JG.WebKit.Views.TemplateContext,System.Int32)
member.summary: Renders the loop by iterating over the collection. For each item, creates a new context with: - {itemName}: the current item - {itemName}.index: the current iteration index (0-based) If the collection is empty or null, renders the empty block if present.

member.name: T:JG.WebKit.Views.Nodes.CommentNode
M:JG.WebKit.Views.Nodes.CommentNode.RenderAsync(JG.WebKit.Views.TemplateContext,System.Int32)
member.summary: Renders nothing (comments are not included in output).

member.name: T:JG.WebKit.Views.Nodes.PartialNode
member.summary: Represents a partial include node with optional variant and context. Partials are sub-templates that can be included and reused across templates. Syntax: {{> partialName }}, {{> partialName "variant" }}, {{> partialName context }} Rendering is delegated to ViewEngine.RenderPartialAsync for proper path resolution and caching.

member.name: M:JG.WebKit.Views.Nodes.PartialNode.#ctor(System.String,System.String,System.String,JG.WebKit.Views.Abstractions.ITemplateProvider,JG.WebKit.Views.ViewEngineOptions)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the PartialNode class.
member.param: The partial name/path (e.g., "header", "cards/featured").
Optional variant suffix (e.g., "mobile" for header-mobile.html).
Optional expression to evaluate for the partial's context.
Unused parameter (kept for compatibility).
Unused parameter (kept for compatibility).

member.name: M:JG.WebKit.Views.Nodes.PartialNode.RenderAsync(JG.WebKit.Views.TemplateContext,System.Int32)
member.summary: Rendering is handled by ViewEngine's RenderPartialAsync method. This method returns empty as partials are processed during compilation.

member.name: P:JG.WebKit.Views.Nodes.PartialNode.Path
member.summary: Gets the partial name/path.

member.name: P:JG.WebKit.Views.Nodes.PartialNode.Variant
member.summary: Gets the optional variant name.

member.name: P:JG.WebKit.Views.Nodes.PartialNode.ContextExpr
member.summary: Gets the optional context expression.

member.name: T:JG.WebKit.Views.Nodes.LayoutNode
member.summary: Represents a layout declaration node. Indicates that this template should be wrapped in the specified layout. Syntax: {{#layout "layoutName" }} The layout node itself produces no output; layout application happens after template rendering.

member.name: M:JG.WebKit.Views.Nodes.LayoutNode.#ctor(System.String)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the LayoutNode class.
member.param: The name of the layout template (e.g., "main", "_layouts/site").

member.name: M:JG.WebKit.Views.Nodes.LayoutNode.RenderAsync(JG.WebKit.Views.TemplateContext,System.Int32)
member.summary: Layout nodes produce no output in the main render pass. The layout name is extracted during compilation and used for post-render layout application.

member.name: P:JG.WebKit.Views.Nodes.LayoutNode.LayoutName
member.summary: Gets the layout template name.

member.name: T:JG.WebKit.Views.Nodes.SectionNode
member.summary: Represents a section definition node for layout content injection. Sections defined in content templates are injected into layout yield points. Syntax: {{#section "sectionName" }}content{{/section}} Section nodes produce no output in the main render; content is extracted and injected during layout rendering.

member.name: M:JG.WebKit.Views.Nodes.SectionNode.#ctor(System.String,System.Collections.Generic.List{JG.WebKit.Views.Nodes.INode})
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the SectionNode class.
member.param: The section name (must match a yield in the layout).
The nodes to render when this section is yielded.

member.name: M:JG.WebKit.Views.Nodes.SectionNode.RenderAsync(JG.WebKit.Views.TemplateContext,System.Int32)
member.summary: Sections produce no output in the main content render. Their content is extracted and rendered only when yielded by the layout.

member.name: P:JG.WebKit.Views.Nodes.SectionNode.SectionName
member.summary: Gets the section name.

member.name: P:JG.WebKit.Views.Nodes.SectionNode.Nodes
member.summary: Gets the nodes that make up the section content.

member.name: T:JG.WebKit.Views.Nodes.YieldNode
member.summary: Represents a yield point in a layout where content or sections are injected. Syntax: {{#yield "sectionName" }} If sectionName is "content", injects the entire rendered content. Otherwise, injects the named section from the content template.

member.name: M:JG.WebKit.Views.Nodes.YieldNode.#ctor(System.String)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the YieldNode class.
member.param: The section name to yield ("content" for main content).

member.name: M:JG.WebKit.Views.Nodes.YieldNode.RenderAsync(JG.WebKit.Views.TemplateContext,System.Int32)
member.summary: Yield nodes produce no output when rendered directly. Content injection is handled by ViewEngine.ApplyLayoutAsync.

member.name: P:JG.WebKit.Views.Nodes.YieldNode.SectionName
member.summary: Gets the section name to yield.

member.name: T:JG.WebKit.Views.Nodes.YieldDefaultNode
M:JG.WebKit.Views.Nodes.YieldDefaultNode.#ctor(System.String,System.Collections.Generic.List{JG.WebKit.Views.Nodes.INode})
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the YieldDefaultNode class.
member.param: The section name to yield.
Nodes to render if the section is not provided.

member.name: M:JG.WebKit.Views.Nodes.YieldDefaultNode.RenderAsync(JG.WebKit.Views.TemplateContext,System.Int32)
member.summary: Renders the default content. During layout application, this is only rendered if the section is not provided.

member.name: P:JG.WebKit.Views.Nodes.YieldDefaultNode.SectionName
member.summary: Gets the section name.

member.name: T:JG.WebKit.Views.Nodes.HelperNode
member.summary: Represents a helper call node (currently unused, reserved for future use). Helpers are currently processed inline by VariableNode.

member.name: M:JG.WebKit.Views.Nodes.HelperNode.#ctor(System.String,System.Collections.Generic.List{System.String})
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the HelperNode class.
member.param: The helper name.
The helper arguments.

member.name: M:JG.WebKit.Views.Nodes.HelperNode.RenderAsync(JG.WebKit.Views.TemplateContext,System.Int32)
member.summary: Reserved for future use. Currently returns empty.

member.name: P:JG.WebKit.Views.Nodes.HelperNode.HelperName
member.summary: Gets the helper name.

member.name: P:JG.WebKit.Views.Nodes.HelperNode.Arguments
member.summary: Gets the helper arguments.

member.name: T:JG.WebKit.Views.Providers.FileTemplateProvider
member.summary: Template provider that reads templates from the file system.

member.name: P:JG.WebKit.Views.Providers.FileTemplateProvider.SupportsHotReload
member.summary: Gets a value indicating whether this provider supports hot-reload notification.

member.name: M:JG.WebKit.Views.Providers.FileTemplateProvider.#ctor(System.String,JG.WebKit.Views.ViewEngineOptions)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the FileTemplateProvider class.
member.param: The base directory for template files.
The view engine options.

member.name: M:JG.WebKit.Views.Providers.FileTemplateProvider.GetTemplateAsync(System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Gets a template by path from the file system.
member.param: The template path.
Cancellation token.
member.returns: The template source, or null if not found.

member.name: M:JG.WebKit.Views.Providers.FileTemplateProvider.EnableHotReload(System.Action{System.String})
member.summary: Enables hot-reload by watching for file changes.
member.param: Callback when a template file changes.

member.name: M:JG.WebKit.Views.Providers.FileTemplateProvider.Dispose
member.summary: Disposes the file watcher.

member.name: T:JG.WebKit.Views.Providers.InMemoryTemplateProvider
member.summary: Template provider that stores templates in memory.

member.name: P:JG.WebKit.Views.Providers.InMemoryTemplateProvider.SupportsHotReload
member.summary: Gets a value indicating whether this provider supports hot-reload notification.

member.name: M:JG.WebKit.Views.Providers.InMemoryTemplateProvider.AddTemplate(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Adds a template to the in-memory store.
member.param: The template path.
The template content.

member.name: M:JG.WebKit.Views.Providers.InMemoryTemplateProvider.GetTemplateAsync(System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Gets a template by path from memory.
member.param: The template path.
Cancellation token.
member.returns: The template source, or null if not found.

member.name: T:JG.WebKit.Views.TemplateContext
member.summary: Contains the rendering context for a template, including data and globals.

member.name: P:JG.WebKit.Views.TemplateContext.Data
member.summary: Gets the template data model.

member.name: P:JG.WebKit.Views.TemplateContext.Globals
member.summary: Gets site-wide globals available to all templates.

member.name: P:JG.WebKit.Views.TemplateContext.HttpContext
member.summary: Gets the current HTTP context, if applicable.

member.name: M:JG.WebKit.Views.TemplateContext.#ctor(System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyDictionary{System.String,System.Object},System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyDictionary{System.String,System.Object},Microsoft.AspNetCore.Http.HttpContext)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the TemplateContext class.
member.param: The template data model.
Site-wide globals available to all templates.
The current HTTP context, if applicable.

member.name: T:JG.WebKit.Views.TemplateSource
member.summary: Contains the content and metadata of a template source.

member.name: P:JG.WebKit.Views.TemplateSource.Content
member.summary: Gets the template content.

member.name: P:JG.WebKit.Views.TemplateSource.Path
member.summary: Gets the template path or identifier.

member.name: P:JG.WebKit.Views.TemplateSource.LastModified
member.summary: Gets the last modified date of the template, if available.

member.name: T:JG.WebKit.Views.ViewEngineOptions
member.summary: Configures the template engine behavior.

member.name: P:JG.WebKit.Views.ViewEngineOptions.TemplatePath
member.summary: Gets or sets the directory containing template files.

member.name: P:JG.WebKit.Views.ViewEngineOptions.LayoutPath
member.summary: Gets or sets the directory containing layout files.

member.name: P:JG.WebKit.Views.ViewEngineOptions.PartialPath
member.summary: Gets or sets the directory containing partial files.

member.name: P:JG.WebKit.Views.ViewEngineOptions.Assets
member.summary: Gets the asset path configuration.

member.name: P:JG.WebKit.Views.ViewEngineOptions.CacheCompiledTemplates
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether to cache compiled templates.

member.name: P:JG.WebKit.Views.ViewEngineOptions.EnableHotReload
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether to enable hot-reload in development mode.

member.name: P:JG.WebKit.Views.ViewEngineOptions.DefaultLayout
member.summary: Gets or sets the default layout name used when no layout is specified.

member.name: P:JG.WebKit.Views.ViewEngineOptions.TemplateExtension
member.summary: Gets or sets the file extension for template files.

member.name: P:JG.WebKit.Views.ViewEngineOptions.AllowRawOutput
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether to allow raw unescaped output ({{{ }}}).

member.name: P:JG.WebKit.Views.ViewEngineOptions.MaxIncludeDepth
member.summary: Gets or sets the maximum include depth to prevent infinite recursion.

member.name: T:JG.WebKit.Views.AssetOptions
member.summary: Configures asset path resolution for templates.

member.name: P:JG.WebKit.Views.AssetOptions.BasePath
member.summary: Gets or sets the base path for all assets.

member.name: P:JG.WebKit.Views.AssetOptions.Images
member.summary: Gets or sets the path for image assets.

member.name: P:JG.WebKit.Views.AssetOptions.Styles
member.summary: Gets or sets the path for stylesheet assets.

member.name: P:JG.WebKit.Views.AssetOptions.Scripts
member.summary: Gets or sets the path for script assets.

member.name: P:JG.WebKit.Views.AssetOptions.Fonts
member.summary: Gets or sets the path for font assets.

member.name: P:JG.WebKit.Views.AssetOptions.Media
member.summary: Gets or sets the path for media assets.

member.name: P:JG.WebKit.Views.AssetOptions.CdnBaseUrl
member.summary: Gets or sets the CDN base URL, prepended to all asset URLs if set.

member.name: P:JG.WebKit.Views.AssetOptions.AppendVersionHash
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether to append a version hash for cache busting.

member.summary: Extension methods for registering JG.WebKit.Views services.

member.summary: Adds the WebKit Views template engine to the service collection.
member.param: The service collection.
Optional configuration action.

member.summary: Registers a custom template provider.
member.param: The service collection.
